page_metadata.biotools__summary: pKNOT (Protein Knot) is a tool that can detect knots in proteins as well as providing information on knotted proteins in PDB. pKNOT-v2 has been updated with a homology modeling tool such that the server can now accept protein sequences in addition to 3D structures or PDB IDs and return knot analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: pKNOT (Protein Knot) is a tool that can detect knots in proteins as well as providing information on knotted proteins in PDB. pKNOT-v2 has been updated with a homology modeling tool such that the server can now accept protein sequences in addition to 3D structures or PDB IDs and return knot analysis.
